title: HappyValley
subtitle: Enterprise Backend Service
description: A comprehensive and scalable enterprise-grade backend system for managing services, bookings, and subscriptions. Built with a modular architecture designed for high performance, maintainability, and seamless scalability. Powers a live concierge service platform.
highlights: AI-powered grocery bot using OpenAI GPT-4o

title: Asetta Autos
subtitle: MERN Vehicle Marketplace
description: A full-stack vehicle marketplace platform built with the MERN stack. Designed for smooth browsing, secure transactions, and efficient vehicle management. Features real-time notifications, admin dashboard, and integrated payment flow.
highlights: Advanced search & filter by brand, price, category
Admin panel: manage users, listings & approvals
Fully responsive design for mobile & desktop

title: BeautyLuxe
subtitle: E-Commerce MERN App
description: A beauty product e-commerce platform where users can explore, filter, and purchase beauty products. Features JWT authentication, cart management, Firebase login, and a full admin panel for product and order management.

title: SpeakEasy Academy
subtitle: Language Learning Platform
description: A role-based language learning platform with Students, Instructors, and Admins. Students browse and purchase foreign language classes, instructors manage their courses, and admins approve/reject class submissions with real-time feedback.
highlights: Three-tier role system: Student, Instructor, Admin
Stripe payment integration for class enrollment
Protected routes with JWT & Firebase Auth
